notes: The current restaurant-issued menu contains 85 actual menu items across 15 sections; the frozen generated record contains only 33 rows representing 25 unique official titles.
Sol corrected Terra's single false missing-item claim: Taquitos de Lengua is present on the current menu and matches frozen item 33 by description.
No comprehensive allergen matrix, complete ingredient list, allergen legend, negative-claim coverage, or cross-contact policy was located.
Restaurant-authored menu prose can support direct positive ingredient signals only; absent terms are not negative assurances.
The generic website extraction emitted eight section, navigation, price, social, or description artifacts and substituted descriptions for twelve item titles.
The extraction also omitted most of the current official menu.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Official restaurant site identified Atlacatl Restaurant as Salvadoran Cuisine and Pupuseria and linked the current menu.
The restaurant-issued legacy route presented the same menu family and independently exposed the social-page boilerplate artifact.
No restaurant-linked ordering-vendor menu or allergen surface was identified from the official site.

The dated official menu route remained publicly readable and corroborated the current menu structure.

evidence.excerpt: Current menu lists 85 item headings from Nachos Mexicanos through Tortilla, including Taquitos de Lengua with the description 'Three beef tongue tacos. Served with rice and a side salad.' It publishes item prose but no comprehensive allergen or cross-contact guide.

notes: Restaurant-issued current menu; direct positive ingredient wording is partial evidence, not a complete allergen matrix.

evidence.excerpt: Dated restaurant-issued menu route corroborates the current hierarchy and Taquitos de Lengua while showing 'Like this:' as page boilerplate rather than menu data.

request.result: Coordinator artifact capture was blocked by the site's browser challenge; research workers accessed the public page.

findings.summary: The 33-row generated record omits 60 titles from the current 85-item official menu and includes eight non-item or duplicate artifacts from headings, navigation, a price, social boilerplate, and description fragments.

Thirteen generated rows use description text as the item identity instead of the restaurant's displayed item title, including Chorizos Salvadoreños, Side of Fried Yucca, Lengua Empanizada, and Camarones al Ajillo.
The official menu provides selected direct ingredient prose but no comprehensive allergen matrix, complete ingredients, negative-claim coverage, or cross-contact policy.

repairs.summary: Replace the corrupted partial extraction with the current 85-item restaurant-issued menu, preserve section titles and descriptions, and retain only direct positive ingredient signals.
